<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "GLONET HR forecast evaluation"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis

from pathlib import Path

from helpers.live_validation_manifest import forecast_validation_metadata, report_notebook_path
from helpers.live_validation_report import render_forecast_validation_page

notebook_path = report_notebook_path("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json", "octo-glonet-hr-p1d")
metadata = forecast_validation_metadata("reports/nrt-validation-manifest.json", "octo-glonet-hr-p1d")
if Path(notebook_path).exists():
    print(render_forecast_validation_page(notebook_path, metadata))
else:
    print(
        f'<section class="validation-intro"><p class="validation-main-message">'
        f'{metadata.system_label} forecast evaluation status: {metadata.status}. '
        'The executed report notebook is not available yet.</p></section>'
    )
```
